steps.title: Identify the key statistic from the notes
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the number of sites with pre-Clovis items. Only one note directly provides this information: “More than a dozen North American sites containing pre-Clovis items have been identified.”

steps.title: Apply the statistic to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly incorporates this statistic by describing the Mud Lake site as “among more than a dozen such locations in North America” and opens with “Far from being the only place,” which explicitly highlights the plurality of sites.

The other three fail to emphasize quantity:
  • A describes Clovis settlement instead
  • C focuses on a single site's dating
  • D names one example without conveying how many similar sites exist
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
